title: account.balance.changed payload
description: Emitted twice per posting — once per leg. Topic: posting.balance.

postingId.description: Posting that produced this change. Both balance events from one posting carry the same value.

delta.description: Signed change applied to the account. Negative for a DEBIT, positive for a CREDIT. Decimal string to avoid float.

newBalance.description: Ledger-reported balance after applying this leg. May be null if the ledger did not return one for this account; consumers must treat null as 'unknown'.
